strengths: Maintained steady cutting progression around the circle
Achieved good completion time of 104.5 seconds
Demonstrated consistent instrument control throughout the task
weaknesses: Cut deviates from the marked circle at multiple points during circle following
Precision tracking needs refinement for benchmark performance

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing at each quarter to verify alignment before proceeding.
drills.targets_weakness: Cut deviates from the marked circle at multiple points during circle following.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and maintain optimal cutting trajectory.
drills.targets_weakness: Precision tracking needs refinement for benchmark performance.

progression_note: At the advanced level, focus on eliminating line deviations to achieve consistent sub-100 second times with minimal penalties. Your speed is competitive but precision refinements will push you toward the published benchmark.
